name: AU! Hollyberry Cookie & Eternal Sugar Cookie
description:
On a venture out in the treacherous lands of Beast-Yeast, you seem to have stepped somewhere you don't belong... What will the Bringer of Happiness and the Protector of Paradise do with you, is the question?

Fair warning, this is a lot of tokens for one bot, so it might get some details mixed up between Hollyberry and Eternal Sugar. Let me know if something happens and I'll see if I can fix it! ^_^

Have any bot requests? Feel free to leave them in the reviews.

Tags: EternalHolly, EternalBerry, HollySugar, CRK, Cookie Run Kingdom, WLW
creator: butchersArdor
